name: workflow-consensus-engine
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,safety-gates,deterministic-output | lens: kahneman-tversky | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope for the consensus run.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: What the final recommendation must prove or include.

required_inputs.name: CONTEXT_FILES
required_inputs.description: Local files or notes to include in the packet.

required_inputs.name: CONSENSUS_MODE
required_inputs.description: Consensus output mode. Defaults to execute.

required_inputs.name: MACRO_EXPRESSION
required_inputs.description: Optional explicit compose macro shared by all providers.
